metadata.description: Plugin marketplace for Claude Code and Codex extensions

plugins.name: compound-engineering
plugins.description: AI-powered development tools that get smarter with every use. Make each unit of engineering work easier than the last.

plugins.name: coding-tutor
plugins.description: Personalized coding tutorials that build on your existing knowledge and use your actual codebase for examples. Includes spaced repetition quizzes to reinforce learning. Includes 3 commands and 1 skill.

plugins.name: engineering-advanced-skills
plugins.description: Advanced engineering skills for agent design, workflow design, architecture, release management, observability, CI/CD, browser automation, security, and production operations.

plugins.name: engineering-skills
plugins.description: Production engineering skills for frontend, backend, fullstack, QA, DevOps, security, cloud, data, and AI/ML workflows.

plugins.name: claude-mem
plugins.description: Memory compression system for Claude Code that helps preserve useful project context across sessions.
